历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 11196 → 12411 → 8960 → 11249 → 35759. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the range of 8960–12411, showing relative stability overall; in 2025, due to Yunnan Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category/History Category), the division of major groups led to a significant drop in rankings for the unrestricted subject selection group (including Information Management and Information Systems, Accounting, etc.) to 35759, while the rankings for the chemistry-required major group (core engineering) remained around 9305, forming a clear divergence; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Yunnan Province was 85 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 112 in 2023, 86 in 2024, and 86 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 89, a slight expansion of about 3.5% compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 80th, with recent rankings stable in the 80–83 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was relatively negative, mainly due to the sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors attracting attention; in the 2026 cycle, there have been negative public opinions related to academic misconduct (students using others' works in competitions, academic misconduct leading to expulsion), and the overall evaluation remains relatively negative, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. It ranks 77th in Douyin popularity, with an evaluation of "average," indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A-level, making it the university's strongest discipline; overall engineering strength is robust, with outstanding disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering, Instrument Science, and Materials Science, which highly align with the admission majors in Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social attention; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Yunnan Province is approximately 229,000 (estimated based on the 2025 ratio), an increase of about 32% from 173,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, in the East China region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Yunnan Province in the southwest; the university is in.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking fluctuations in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the slight expansion in 2026 (+3.5%), the substantial increase in Physics Category examinees (approximately +32%), and the relatively negative reputation of the university, the predicted minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 is approximately 36307, with a range of 35807–36807.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 2995 → 2845 → 2968 → 3396 → 8963. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking fluctuated narrowly within the range of 2845–3396, showing overall stability; in 2025, due to Yunnan Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (History Category/Physics Category), the ranking for the History Category significantly dropped to 8963, mainly affected by the change in exam format and the division of major groups; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Yunnan Province was 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6, a 25% reduction compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction and may reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide, but the university is strong in engineering, with relatively weak liberal arts strength; in 2025, the reputation was somewhat negative (the admission cutoff for popular majors plummeted), and in 2026, there was negative public opinion regarding academic misconduct, overall negative; ranked 77th in Douyin popularity, with a rating of 'average', moderate exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Management Science and Engineering received an A grade, which is in the management discipline direction; liberal arts majors (English, Indonesian) have no A-class discipline support, and the disciplinary advantages are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors (English, Indonesian) have generally lukewarm social popularity, not a hot direction; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Yunnan Province is approximately 148,900 (estimated based on the 2025 proportion), an increase of about 32% compared to 112,400 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the examinee pool; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui, which is an inter-provincial application for Yunnan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking fluctuation in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the 25% enrollment reduction in 2026, the substantial increase in History Category examinees (approximately +32%), and the generally lukewarm popularity of foreign language majors, the enrollment reduction pushes the ranking forward while the increase in examinees pushes it backward, roughly offsetting each other. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7719, with a range of 7219–8219.
